# Nexa API Documentation

> Developer docs for the Nexa API family — one account, all products.
> Hosted at https://docs.nexa.one. API base at https://api.nexa.one.

## Products

- **NexaAds** — REST + MCP for Meta Ads (60+ tools) and Google Ads (35+ tools). Base: https://api.nexaads.com/v1
- **NexaCreate** — Generative image and video. Credits-based, async jobs, Replicate backend. Base: https://api.nexacreate.com/v1
- **NexaLytics** — Creator-economy data: profile lookup, audience analytics, media-kit generation. Base: https://api.nexalytics.com/v1
- **NexaVoize** — Voice assistant + TTS with XTTS v2 + Claude. Base: https://api.nexavoize.com/v1

## Shared conventions

- Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` — tokens issued at nexa.one → Settings → API Tokens.
- Keys: `nx_sk_live_*` (production), `nx_sk_test_*` (sandbox), `nx_pk_live_*` (publishable / front-end read-only).
- Errors: uniform JSON shape with `type`, `code`, `message`, `request_id`.
- Pagination: cursor-based with `cursor`, `has_more`, `next_cursor`.
- Idempotency: send `Idempotency-Key` on unsafe methods; responses cached 24 h.
- Versioning: path-based (`/v1`), never breaking within a major.

## Where to start

- Quickstart: https://docs.nexa.one/quickstart
- Authentication: https://docs.nexa.one/auth
- Webhooks: https://docs.nexa.one/webhooks
- SDKs: https://docs.nexa.one/sdks (TypeScript, Python, Go)
- Examples: https://docs.nexa.one/examples
- Changelog: https://docs.nexa.one/changelog

## Machine-readable API specs

- https://docs.nexa.one/openapi-nexaads.yaml
- https://docs.nexa.one/openapi-nexacreate.yaml
- https://docs.nexa.one/openapi-nexalytics.yaml
- https://docs.nexa.one/openapi-nexavoize.yaml

## Agents via MCP

Every product ships a Model Context Protocol server at
`https://api.<product>.com/mcp`. Connect with a bearer token that has the
`mcp` scope.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/schenkei-code/nexa-docs
- Email: dominikschenkel.business@gmail.com
